title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.450 - Meetings, number required annually — called how — quorum
text:
226.450.  Meetings, number required annually — called how — quorum. — The commission shall meet at least two times each year at the call of the chairman, or upon the request of four members.  A majority of the commission shall constitute a quorum for the transaction of business.
(L. 1979 S.B. 489)
